info.title: OpenCatalogi
info.description: OpenCatalogi's public, anonymously-reachable API surface: full-text search, catalog and publication read access, DCAT-AP-NL and schema.org harvest feeds, DIWOO sitemaps/robots.txt, the federation read surface, the federated-directory sync endpoint, and the CMS read APIs (pages/menus/themes/glossary/listings). Every path in this document corresponds to a route in `appinfo/routes.php` whose controller method carries `@PublicPage` / `#[PublicPage]` — admin-gated and authenticated-only endpoints (settings, retention, Woo batches, setup, OOAPI 5.0 resource reads, DCAT/DIWOO/OOAPI validation reports) are out of scope; see the `public-api-openapi-document` OpenSpec change.

servers.description: OpenCatalogi app base path on a Nextcloud instance.

host.description: Hostname of the Nextcloud instance running OpenCatalogi.

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Public full-text search across publications and documents.

tags.name: DCAT
tags.description: DCAT-AP-NL harvest feeds with content negotiation.

tags.name: Directory
tags.description: Federated directory listing and peer sync.

tags.name: OOAPI
tags.description: OOAPI 5.0 CORS preflight — the resource endpoints themselves require consumer-credential authentication and are out of scope for this document.

Error.description: Standard error envelope. Some endpoints use `error`, some `message`, a few both.

SelfMeta.description: OpenRegister object metadata. The exact property set is register/schema dependent and MUST NOT be frozen here — additionalProperties covers it.

ObjectRecord.description: A single register-defined object (publication, document, catalog, page, menu, theme, glossary term, listing, …). Properties beyond `@self` are defined by the instance's configured schema and are intentionally NOT frozen in this document (design decision D3) — additionalProperties: true.

total.description: Total matching objects across all pages.

facets.description: Facet counts, present when `_facets` was requested.

SearchEnvelope.description: Public full-text search result envelope (WOO-506). Flat mix of publication and document rows, discriminated by `@self.schema`.

CatalogPublicationsEnvelope.description: PaginatedEnvelope plus catalog-scoping metadata added by PublicationsController::index — `@catalog` (slug/title/schemas/registers) and resolved schema/register objects merged into `@self`.

FederationEnvelope.description: Aggregated local + federated publication list with pagination links.

DirectoryListEnvelope.description: Combined local + known-peer directory listing data.

SchemaOrgDataCatalog.description: A schema.org `DataCatalog` JSON-LD node (single document, no result envelope).

DcatDocument.description: DCAT-AP-NL RDF document. Serialization is content-negotiated via `?format=` (authoritative) or the `Accept` header; body shape depends on the negotiated media type (JSON-LD object, or a Turtle/RDF-XML string).

SearchParam.name: _search
SearchParam.description: Free-text search term applied across the scoped schema(s).

ExtendParam.name: _extend
ExtendParam.description: Comma-separated list (or repeated param) of relations to expand inline. Sanitised server-side on the public surface — anonymous callers cannot traverse to unrelated objects via arbitrary extend targets.

FacetsParam.name: _facets
FacetsParam.description: Facet request, e.g. `_facets[@self][register]=true`. Object shape mirrors OpenRegister's facet-query dialect; additionalProperties covers the nested keys.

ContentParam.name: _content
ContentParam.description: Opt-in (default false): widen full-text search to OR-extracted document body text in addition to metadata (WOO-517).

EmptyParam.name: _empty
EmptyParam.description: When true, keep empty-valued properties in results instead of stripping them.

FormatParam.name: format
FormatParam.description: Explicit DCAT serialization format; overrides `Accept` header negotiation.

DcatPageParam.name: page
DcatPageParam.description: 1-based page number for harvester-grade pagination of the per-catalog DCAT feed.

SitemapPageParam.name: page
SitemapPageParam.description: 1-based page number for the sitemap page document.

AccessControlAllowOrigin.description: CORS allowed origin (`*` unless an allowlist is configured).

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist.

ServiceUnavailable.description: The search/data backend (OpenRegister) is not installed or not configured.

get.description: List all catalogs the caller may see (RBAC-filtered).
Retrieve a single catalog by id, plus the objects filtered by the catalog's registers/schemas.
DCAT-AP-NL document for one catalog. Only publicly-visible objects appear (DCAT-003). Supports conditional GET via ETag (304) and harvester-grade pagination via `page` (DCAT-008).

options.description: CORS preflight for the per-catalog DCAT document.

CORS preflight only (OOAPI-001/COR-001). The `GET` resource on this path requires OOAPI-008 consumer-credential authentication (`@NoAdminRequired`, not `@PublicPage`) — out of scope for this anonymous-public document.

CORS preflight only (OOAPI-001/COR-001). The `GET` resource on this path requires OOAPI-008 consumer-credential authentication (`@NoAdminRequired`, not `@PublicPage`) — out of scope for this anonymous-public document.

get.description: A single schema.org `DataCatalog` JSON-LD node for the given catalog. Only publicly-visible publications are listed.
DCAT-AP-NL document listing every DCAT-enabled catalog on this instance.
Combined local + known-peer federated directory listing.

post.description: Peer broadcast-receive endpoint — federated instances POST here (via BroadcastService) to announce themselves. Not for admin UI use; admin-initiated syncs go through `POST /api/listings/add`.

directory.description: URL of the peer's directory endpoint.

get.description: Local + federated publications, aggregated and paginated across sources.
Retrieve one publication by id from local or federated sources.
List a federated publication's attachments.
Stream a federated publication's file content.
Objects that reference this publication.
Objects this publication references.
Public list of glossary.
Retrieve a single glossary entry.

options.description: CORS preflight for `/api/listings`. `GET`/`POST` on this exact path require an authenticated (non-admin) session — out of scope for this anonymous-public document.
CORS preflight for `/api/listings/add`. The `POST` action is admin-authenticated — out of scope here.
CORS preflight for `/api/listings/sync`. The `POST` action is admin-authenticated — out of scope here.

get.description: Retrieve a single directory listing by id.
Public list of menus.
Retrieve a single menus entry.

Serves this static document with `info.version` substituted at serve time from the installed app version (`IAppManager::getAppVersion('opencatalogi')`) and CORS headers, same posture as the rest of the public surface.
Public list of pages.
Retrieve a single pages entry.
Generated robots.txt referencing every catalog/category sitemap.

Anonymous-reachable full-text search across publications and documents (WOO-506). Metadata matching always runs; pass `_content=true` to also match OR-extracted document body text (WOO-517). Only publicly-visible rows are ever returned, regardless of caller identity.
Public list of themes.
Retrieve a single themes entry.
Catalog-scoped publication list. Matched LAST among the public routes (routes.php ordering) so specific paths like `/api/search` or `/api/catalogi` are never shadowed by this wildcard.

options.description: CORS preflight for the catalog-scoped publications surface.

get.description: Sitemap index (list of sitemap page URLs) for a catalog and Woo information category.
One page of the DIWOO sitemap for a catalog and Woo information category.
Retrieve a single publication by id, validated to belong to the given catalog's schemas/registers.
List a publication's file attachments.
Stream a publication's file content.
Objects that reference (use) this publication (B → A).
Objects this publication references (A → B).
